sources.title: Cold Deck (Full Movie) Crime, Drama
sources.description:
Broke and miserable, Bobby's only escape is poker.  When he's invited to join a secret high-stakes game, he ups the ante, plotting to rob the players.  Unknown to him, the game is run by a sadist determined to cash Bobby out - permanently.

Directed by Zack Bernbaum
2015
Starring Stéfano Gallo, Paul Sorvino, Robert Knepper, Jessica Sipos

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: When a poker player hits rock bottom, he enlists his best friend to pull off a high-stakes heist.
metadata.Actors: Stéfano Gallo, Paul Sorvino, Robert Knepper
